title: Family & Community Page

fields.label: Badge Text
fields.name: fcp_intro_badge
fields.instructions: Small label above the heading, e.g. "Resources for Our Community".

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: fcp_intro_heading
fields.instructions: Main <h2> heading for the intro section. Leave blank to hide the entire intro.

fields.label: Body Paragraph 1
fields.name: fcp_intro_body_1
fields.instructions: First body paragraph (rendered below the heading as the section subtitle).
fields.default_value: PC4S connects families with the tools, knowledge, and services they need to thrive. Below you’ll find community resource guides, outreach materials, and mental health references — all available as free downloads.

fields.label: Body Paragraph 2
fields.name: fcp_intro_body_2
fields.instructions: Second body paragraph (optional, displayed below the first).
fields.default_value: Whether you’re a parent looking for guidance, an educator seeking prevention materials, or a community member wanting to connect with local services, these resources are designed to help. Our resource guides are updated regularly to ensure the most accurate and helpful information for Rutherford County residents.

fields.label: CTA Button Label
fields.name: fcp_intro_cta_label
fields.instructions: Label for the anchor link that scrolls down to the resource list. Leave blank to hide the button.

fields.label: Highlights List
fields.name: fcp_intro_highlights
fields.instructions: Resource highlight items shown in the right-hand sidebar of the intro section.

sub_fields.label: Title
sub_fields.name: fcp_highlight_title
sub_fields.instructions: Bold title for the highlight item, e.g. "Family Resources".

sub_fields.label: Subtitle
sub_fields.name: fcp_highlight_subtitle
sub_fields.instructions: Short description below the title, e.g. "Guides for parents, caregivers & youth".
sub_fields.placeholder: e.g. Guides for parents, caregivers & youth

fields.label: Section Badge
fields.name: fcp_res_badge
fields.instructions: Small label above the resource list heading.

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: fcp_res_heading
fields.instructions: Main <h2> heading for the resource download cards section.

fields.label: Section Subtitle
fields.name: fcp_res_subtitle
fields.instructions: Short paragraph below the resource section heading.
fields.default_value: Download the latest resource guides for families, outreach workers, and mental health advocates in Rutherford County. All documents are free.

fields.label: Resource Download Cards
fields.name: fcp_resource_cards
fields.instructions: PDF download cards. Each card has a category label, title, description, date badge, and a file attachment.

sub_fields.label: Category Label
sub_fields.name: fcp_card_category
sub_fields.instructions: Category displayed above the card title, e.g. "Family Resources".

sub_fields.label: Card Title
sub_fields.name: fcp_card_title
sub_fields.instructions: Title of the resource guide, e.g. "Family Resources Guide".

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: fcp_card_desc
sub_fields.instructions: Short description of what this resource covers.

sub_fields.label: Date Badge Label
sub_fields.name: fcp_card_date_label
sub_fields.instructions: Date badge shown on the card, e.g. "Updated January 2026". Leave blank to hide.

sub_fields.label: PDF File
sub_fields.name: fcp_card_file
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the PDF resource file. Both the Download and View buttons link to this file.

fields.label: Section Badge
fields.name: fcp_ext_badge
fields.instructions: Small label above the external links heading.

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: fcp_ext_heading
fields.instructions: Main <h2> heading for the external resource links section.

fields.label: Section Subtitle
fields.name: fcp_ext_subtitle
fields.instructions: Short paragraph below the external links heading.
fields.default_value: Explore these trusted organizations for additional support, education, and treatment resources.

fields.label: External Resource Links
fields.name: fcp_external_links
fields.instructions: Quick-link cards to trusted external resources. Each card links to an external website, phone number, or other URL.

sub_fields.label: Link Name
sub_fields.name: fcp_link_name
sub_fields.instructions: Display name for the link card, e.g. "Kidcentral TN".

sub_fields.label: URL
sub_fields.name: fcp_link_url
sub_fields.instructions: Full URL, phone (tel:) or other href value. Examples: https://kidcentraltn.com or tel:1-800-889-9789

sub_fields.label: Short Description
sub_fields.name: fcp_link_desc
sub_fields.instructions: Brief description displayed below the link name, e.g. "Family & child resources".

sub_fields.label: Open in New Tab
sub_fields.name: fcp_link_new_tab
sub_fields.instructions: Tick to open the link in a new browser tab.

fields.label: Section Badge
fields.name: fcp_loc_badge
fields.instructions: Small label above the location section heading.

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: fcp_loc_heading
fields.instructions: Main <h2> heading for the Find Us section.

fields.label: Section Subtitle
fields.name: fcp_loc_subtitle
fields.instructions: Short paragraph below the location section heading.
fields.default_value: Stop by our office or reach out to connect with a team member and access in-person resources.

fields.label: Office Hours
fields.name: fcp_office_hours
fields.instructions: Office hours text displayed in the info panel. Use a newline character (\n) or two separate lines if needed. Address, phone, and email are pulled from PC4S → Settings.

fields.label: Google Maps Embed URL
fields.name: fcp_map_embed_url
fields.instructions:
Paste only the `src` URL from a Google Maps embed code here — NOT the full <iframe> tag. Example: https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18...

To get this URL: Google Maps → Share → Embed a map → copy the src= value only.

fields.label: CTA Badge
fields.name: fcp_cta_badge
fields.instructions: Small label above the CTA heading.

fields.label: CTA Heading
fields.name: fcp_cta_heading
fields.instructions: Main heading for the CTA section. Leave blank to hide the section entirely.

fields.label: CTA Subtitle
fields.name: fcp_cta_subtitle
fields.instructions: Short paragraph below the CTA heading.
fields.default_value: Our team is here to help connect you and your family with the right services. Reach out today — no matter where you are in your journey.

fields.label: Primary CTA Link
fields.name: fcp_cta_primary
fields.instructions: Primary action button (URL, label, and optional target). E.g. Contact Us.

fields.label: Secondary CTA Link
fields.name: fcp_cta_secondary
fields.instructions: Secondary action button (URL, label, and optional target). E.g. Upcoming Events.

description: Fields for the Family & Community page template. Address, phone, and email are sourced from PC4S → Settings (Footer Settings). Office hours and map embed URL are editable here.
